# jgengine-ui тАФ capability index

Reach for these before hand-rolling. Each row is *the thing you need* тЖТ *the primitive that already does it*.

## accessibility-provider тАФ apply accessibility preferences to a subtree тАФ text-scale CSS var, reduced-motion/high-contrast/colorblind/captions data attrs, and the colorblind color-matrix filter

- `AccessibilityProvider` (function) ┬╖ `import { AccessibilityProvider } from "@jgengine/react"`

## accessibility-store тАФ serializable, observable accessibility preferences (reduced motion, high contrast, text scale, colorblind mode, captions) a game binds to its settings and presentation

- `createAccessibilityStore` (function) ┬╖ `import { createAccessibilityStore } from "@jgengine/core/ui"`
